home.title: मतदान मित्र
home.subtitle: Your Election Companion
home.description: Find your polling station, check voter details, generate voter slips, and report issues - all in one place.
home.searchPlaceholder: Search by name, EPIC number, or address...
home.rememberText: Remember: Bring your Voter ID (EPIC) to the polling station. Voting hours are 7:00 AM to 6:00 PM.

voterSearch.title: Voter Search
voterSearch.description: Search for voter details by name, EPIC number, or address.
voterSearch.placeholder: Enter name, EPIC number, or address...
voterSearch.noResults: No voters found matching "{{query}}". Please try a different search term.

qrScanner.title: QR Scanner
qrScanner.description: Scan the QR code on your voter slip to verify your identity at the polling station.
qrScanner.readyDesc: Click the button below to start scanning your voter slip QR code
qrScanner.scanning: Position the QR code within the frame
qrScanner.note: This is a demo feature. In production, this would connect to the Election Commission database for real-time verification.

qrGenerator.title: Generate Voter Slip QR
qrGenerator.description: Generate a QR code for your voter slip to use at the polling station.
qrGenerator.note: This QR code is a demo. In production, it would be generated with secure cryptographic signatures from the Election Commission.

boothLocator.title: Polling Booth Locator
boothLocator.description: Find your nearest polling booth and get directions to reach there on election day.
boothLocator.placeholder: Search by area, constituency, or booth name...
boothLocator.nearestLocation: Showing booths nearest to your current location

complaint.title: File a Complaint
complaint.description: Report any issues related to voting, polling stations, or election-related problems.
complaint.voterIdPlaceholder: Enter your EPIC number if available
complaint.reviewNotice: Please review your complaint details before submitting.
complaint.submittedDesc: Your complaint has been registered. You will receive updates via SMS.
complaint.referenceId: Reference ID will be sent to your phone. Please save it for tracking.
complaint.note: For emergency issues on election day, call the helpline: 1950 (Toll-free)

bloDashboard.title: BLO Dashboard
bloDashboard.loggedIn: Logged in as Booth Level Officer (BLO)
bloDashboard.searchPlaceholder: Search by voter name or ID...

notifications.title: Notifications
notifications.noNotificationsDesc: You're all caught up! Check back later for updates.
